name: Nurse
description: Registered nurses provide patient care, coordinate treatment plans, and support healthcare teams in hospitals, clinics, and specialized care facilities. They are the backbone of quality healthcare delivery.
bullets: Managed care for 6-8 patients per shift in fast-paced ICU environment, maintaining 99.8% medication administration accuracy
Implemented new patient handoff protocol that reduced communication errors by 35% and improved care continuity
Mentored 12 nursing students and new hires, achieving 95% retention rate within first year of employment
